name: asterix_imitation_phase_extend_12000
description: Extend imitation-only warmup to 12000 steps for Asterix to reduce globally high uncertainty before RL dominates updates.
llm_notes: Asterix has alignment_rate=0.0292, high_conf_disagree_rate=0.9708, and mean_entropy=2.0533, indicating the policy is both uncertain and confidently misaligned. Extending the imitation phase beyond 8000 should improve representation grounding.

name: frogger_near_death_priority_boost_v1
description: Boost replay priority for near-death transitions in Frogger so survival-critical human moves are oversampled.
llm_notes: Frogger shows alignment_rate=0.0289 with high_conf_disagree_rate=0.9711 and disagree_near_terminal_rate=1.0, so divergence is worst at survival-critical states. A 3x near_death boost directly targets that gap.

name: riverraid_noop_imitation_downweight
description: Reduce imitation pressure on NOOP in Riverraid to avoid overfitting passive human segments when disagreement actions are yielding higher reward.
llm_notes: Riverraid has low alignment_rate=0.0264 and high_conf_disagree_rate=0.9736, but reward_on_disagree=1.3712 exceeds reward_on_agree=0.6696 while NOOP dominates both human and disagreement counts (12245). Downweighting NOOP imitation tests whether agent reward gains are being suppressed by passive imitation.
